AndrDigitalArtStudio
 
ALWAYS MAKE SURE YOU ARE WORKING ON A COPIED VERSION IN
YOUR CANVA ACCOUNT TO AVOID ISSUES.
To avoid any issues with editing or saving your files, please follow these
steps carefully:
1.Create a Canva Account or Log : In If you don't already have a
Canva account, please sign up at www.canva.com it's free! If you
already have an account, simply log in.
2.Open the Template Link : Click on the Canva template link or button
provided in your download or PDF.
3.Click “Use Template” (Very Important) : Once the link opens, you
must click the purple “Use Template” button at the top. This will copy
the entire template into your own Canva account allowing you to
edit, customize, and save it freely.
4.Do Not Edit the Original Template : Please do not attempt to edit
the original shared file it is view-only and shared with many other
customers.
